title: Assistant Store Manager - Berger Silk Store - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Berger Silk Store - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!
